✅ WHAT WAS CREATED

Core Files:
  ├── youtube-comment-monitor.py        (12 KB) - Main monitoring script
  ├── youtube-comment-monitor.sh        (1 KB)  - Cron wrapper script
  └── youtube-comment-monitor-setup.md  (5 KB)  - Setup guide

Documentation:
  ├── YOUTUBE-MONITOR-README.md         (9 KB)  - Complete guide
  ├── YOUTUBE-MONITOR-INDEX.md          (9 KB)  - Overview & checklist
  ├── YOUTUBE-MONITOR-QUICK-REFERENCE.md (5 KB) - One-page cheat sheet
  └── DEPLOYMENT-SUMMARY-2026-04-18.txt (THIS FILE)

Examples & Templates:
  ├── youtube-monitor-config.example.json   - Configuration template
  ├── youtube-comments.example.jsonl        - Log format example
  └── (Look for these to see expected formats)

Total: 50+ KB of production-ready code and documentation

================================================================================

⏱️  QUICK START (5 MINUTES)

1. Install dependencies:
   pip install google-auth-oauthlib google-auth-httplib2 google-api-python-client

2. Get YouTube API credentials:
   - Go to console.cloud.google.com
   - Create project, enable YouTube Data API v3
   - Create OAuth 2.0 credentials (Desktop)
   - Save JSON to: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-credentials.json

3. Update channel ID (edit youtube-comment-monitor.py, line 45):
   "channel_id": "UCyour_actual_channel_id"  # from youtube.com/channel/UC...

4. Test:
   cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && python3 .cache/youtube-comment-monitor.py

5. Add to cron (*/30 = every 30 minutes):
   crontab -e
   # Add this line:
   */30 * * * * cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && python3 .cache/youtube-comment-monitor.py >> .cache/youtube-monitor.log 2>&1

That's it! System is now monitoring. ✅

================================================================================

📊 WHAT IT DOES (Every 30 Minutes)

Input:  Fetch comments from Concessa Obvius YouTube channel
Process: 
  ├─ Authenticate with YouTube API
  ├─ Fetch recent comments
  ├─ Categorize (Questions / Praise / Spam / Sales)
  ├─ Auto-respond to Questions & Praise
  ├─ Flag Sales for your review
  └─ Log everything to JSONL

Output:
  ├─ youtube-comments.jsonl    (permanent log of all comments)
  ├─ youtube-monitor.log       (execution log)
  ├─ youtube-monitor-report.txt (statistics report)
  └─ youtube-monitor-state.json (tracks processed comments)

Categories:
  ✅ Questions  → Auto-response: "Thanks for the question..."
  ✅ Praise     → Auto-response: "Thank you so much! 🙏"
  🗑️ Spam      → Logged, not responded
  🚩 Sales      → Flagged for your manual review

================================================================================

📁 FILES LOCATION

All files in: ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/

Key files to know:
  • Script: youtube-comment-monitor.py (executable, ~500 lines)
  • Setup:  youtube-comment-monitor-setup.md (detailed walkthrough)
  • Logs:   youtube-comments.jsonl (JSONL format, one per line)
  • Status: youtube-monitor-report.txt (human-readable stats)

To view:
  tail ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor.log          # Execution log
  cat ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl        # All comments
  tail ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor-report.txt   # Reports

================================================================================

🔐 SECURITY CHECKLIST

After setup:
  ☐ Keep youtube-credentials.json PRIVATE (don't commit to git)
  ☐ Add to .gitignore:
      .cache/youtube-credentials.json
      .cache/youtube-token.json
      .cache/youtube-monitor-state.json
  ☐ Verify cron works: crontab -l | grep youtube-comment-monitor
  ☐ Check first run: tail ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/youtube-monitor.log

================================================================================

📖 DOCUMENTATION GUIDE

Start with ONE of these (in order):

1. QUICK START (2 minutes)
   → Read: YOUTUBE-MONITOR-QUICK-REFERENCE.md
   → Perfect if you just need copy-paste commands

2. FULL SETUP (15 minutes)
   → Read: YOUTUBE-MONITOR-README.md
   → Covers everything with examples

3. STEP-BY-STEP (20 minutes)
   → Read: youtube-comment-monitor-setup.md
   → Detailed walkthrough with troubleshooting

4. DEPLOYMENT OVERVIEW (10 minutes)
   → Read: YOUTUBE-MONITOR-INDEX.md
   → Architecture, checklist, and maintenance

All files are in ~/.openclaw/workspace/.cache/ and can be opened with:
  cat filename
  less filename
  open filename

================================================================================

🎯 NEXT STEPS

Immediate (Before first auto-run):
  1. Complete the Quick Start above (5 min)
  2. Test manually: python3 .cache/youtube-comment-monitor.py
  3. Verify OAuth approval works
  4. Add to crontab

After first run:
  1. Check logs: tail .cache/youtube-monitor.log
  2. Review comments: cat .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
  3. Check for errors or issues

Ongoing (Every week):
  1. Review flagged sales comments
  2. Check execution logs for errors
  3. Monitor auto-response accuracy

Optional customization:
  • Edit response templates in youtube-comment-monitor.py
  • Add/modify categorization patterns
  • Change monitoring frequency in crontab
